title: Blush Skincare Studio Product Photo AI
sourceTitle: Blush Skincare Studio Product Photo AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Minimalist blush-pink studio product photography for small transparent glass facial oil dropper bottle with black rubber pipette cap and pale pink serum with dried floral elements, centered with HUILE ÉCLAT VISAGE packaging and clear cylindrical glass vase filled with water and thin stems of dried pink gypsophila. Subject: small transparent glass facial oil dropper bottle with black rubber pipette cap and pale pink serum with dried floral elements is the hero bottle, with clear glass, visible serum texture, premium cap detail, and readable label presence; HUILE ÉCLAT VISAGE appears on the tall skincare box. Scene: Pastel pink tabletop and seamless matching studio background with a raw wooden block under the product and clear cylindrical glass vase filled with water and thin stems of dried pink gypsophila placed as a delicate vertical botanical accent. Composition: Fixed straight-on tabletop composition: bottle centered on natural raw wood, tall matte white box on the left, clear cylindrical vase on the right, all objects sharp and balanced with clean commercial spacing. Signature Elements: Preserved blush skincare studio product photo source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Ultra-realistic minimalist studio skincare photography with high-end cosmetic still-life styling, tactile natural wood grain, transparent glass reflections, dried floral detail, and polished premium ecommerce/editorial finish. Color Palette: Fixed blush pink, soft rose, warm light wood, clean white, transparent glass, pale serum tones, and muted botanical accents. Lighting: Strong directional soft light from the left, long natural flower shadows on the background, gentle highlights on glass, subtle serum reflections, and soft wood texture detail. Camera: Straight-on tabletop product camera angle, all hero objects in sharp focus, controlled depth, readable label, and realistic material clarity. Typography: HUILE ÉCLAT VISAGE appears as clean black typography on the matte white box; BOTANICAL GLOW OIL may appear as a minimal secondary label line only if needed. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
